scenarios.name: Score a single SaaS idea on the 10-factor framework
scenarios.rationale: Treatment scores all 10 named factors 1-10, sums to a 0-100 total, applies the 75/50 verdict thresholds, identifies strengths/weaknesses/critical risks, and lists cheapest assumptions to test; baseline gives a prose pros/cons take with no structured score or verdict.

scenarios.name: Compare three ideas and pick a winner
scenarios.rationale: Treatment scores each idea on all 10 factors, ranks by total, applies Iron Law of the Market for existing-budget check, and recommends a specific shadow test (landing page + $200 LinkedIn ads with 2-5% signup band); baseline picks a winner qualitatively without scoring or validation plan.
